steps.title: Name the disparity
steps.content: The passage says Brancusi strongly influenced minimalist and abstract art but produced relatively few pieces because of his exacting standards. The blank must identify the tension between his large historical influence and small total output.

steps.title: Reject unsupported pairings
steps.content: Choice A invents themes favored by inspired artists. Choice C treats Bird in Space as opposed to his work, though it is an example. Choice D mentions diversity, but the passage emphasizes recurring themes. The remaining choice names the influence-output disparity. The answer is B.
